Title: K562_hic
Description: K562 WT Hi-C contact matrix at multiple resolutions (.hic format). MEGA merge of GSE214123 0h time-point from Bond et al. 2023.

Title: K562_loops
Description: K562 WT 5 kb Hi-C loop calls (.txt). From GSE214123 0h time-point (Bond et al. 2023).

Title: K562_CTCF_bw
Description: K562 WT CTCF ChIP-seq merged bigWig (GSE213908 PMA 0h) from Bond et al. 2023.

Title: K562_H3K27ac_bw
Description: K562 WT H3K27ac ChIP-seq merged bigWig (GSE213908 PMA 0h) from Bond et al. 2023.
